name: 14q32_31_DLK1_MEG3_imprinted_SD
description: Imprinted DLK1-MEG3 (DLK1-DIO3) domain at 14q32.2, ~1.4 Mb, with paternally-expressed DLK1/RTL1/DIO3 and maternally-expressed MEG3/MEG8/snoRNA-cluster/miRNA-cluster. The cluster is flanked by small directly-oriented SDs (5-15 kb at 95-98% identity) that drive rare deletions causing Temple syndrome (mat UPD14/del) and Kagami-Ogata syndrome (pat UPD14/del). Robertsonian translocations involving 14 commonly unmask UPD14.

architecture.internal_structure: DLK1 - MEG3 (IG-DMR) - RTL1 - MEG8 - DLK1 snoRNA/miRNA clusters - DIO3 ordered telomere-distal-to-centromere; flanking 5-15 kb SDs at the cluster edges.
